tasks.subject: Task 1: Add theme field to map data
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a short editorial `theme` label on each map record so the maps stats strip can render it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/types/cs2.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/cs2/maps/route.ts`

**Verify:** `curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/cs2/maps?active=true | grep -o '"theme":"[^"]*"' | head` → 7 lines of theme values

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/types/cs2.ts", "src/app/api/cs2/maps/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GameMap has theme?: string", "All 7 active maps have theme populated", "API response includes theme", "TS compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create cs2-redesign.css foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author the full scoped stylesheet for the redesign.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/cs2/cs2-redesign.css`

**Verify:** Page boots without CSS warnings after Task 3 imports it.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/cs2-redesign.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All styles scoped under .cs2-redesign", "Tokens match spec", "Classes for hero, section, card, weapon-tab, mech-block, cta-strip defined", "Responsive + reduced-motion rules present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Hero rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the corner-bracket hero with the new chassis: gradient title, mono kicker, embedded data strip, live badge, tick indicator. Wrap the entire page tree in `cs2-redesign section-heading-redesign`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`

**Verify:** Open /cs2, hero shows mono kicker, gradient title, data strip (Engine/Released/Mode/Esport), live badge, tick indicator. Screenshot rotates every 12s, tick advances.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Wrapper has cs2-redesign + section-heading-redesign classes", "cs2-redesign.css imported", "Hero matches spec (kicker, title, lede, data strip, badge, indicator)", "Screenshot rotation + tick advance work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Maps section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the maps grid with chassis cards (`// MAP · ##`, DEFUSAL tag, mono stats strip).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`

**Verify:** /cs2 maps section shows new chassis cards with index, image, mono stats strip (Released/Theme/Mode). Hover lifts card + scales image.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Section uses cs2-section + cs2-shell", "Header: SECTION 01 BATTLEGROUNDS + gradient MAPY V CS2", "Cards use chassis with sequential index", "Stats strip shows Released/Theme/Mode", "No Tailwind in section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Weapons section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace pill category buttons with rectangular chassis tabs, weapon cards with the chassis (contained image frame, `// WPN · ##` index, price/damage/team stats).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`

**Verify:** /cs2 weapons section shows rectangular tabs with /count, gradient active tab, chassis cards with centered weapon images and mono stats strip.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Section uses cs2-section + cs2-shell", "Header: SECTION 02 ARMORY + gradient ZBRANĚ", "Tabs are rectangular with /count", "Active tab has gradient bg", "Cards contained image frame", "Stats: price (cyan) / damage / team (pink)", "No Tailwind in section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mechanics section (replaces Game Info)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop the existing 2-column Game Info block. Add a new Mechanics section at the bottom with 6 numbered intel blocks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`

**Verify:** /cs2 — Game Info gone, new Mechanics section at bottom with 6 numbered blocks (// 01 — // 06), 2-col grid.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Game Info block removed", "New section uses cs2-section cs2-mechanics", "Header: SECTION 03 MECHANICS", "6 mech blocks split on ' - '", "2-col grid → 1-col on mobile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CTA strip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the existing back button with the framed CTA strip.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`

**Verify:** /cs2 — bottom shows framed CTA with pink kicker and `Zpět na hlavní stránku →` link. Hover lifts. Click navigates to /.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Old red button removed", "New cs2-cta-strip with pink END · CHAPTER 03 kicker", "Framed link to / with cyan arrow", "Hover lift + cyan border", "Keyboard focus shows outline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Skeleton components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update MapCardSkeleton + WeaponCardSkeleton to match chassis. Update loading-state JSX in page.tsx.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: `src/app/components/MapCardSkeleton.tsx`
- Rewrite: `src/app/components/WeaponCardSkeleton.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx` (loading branch)

**Verify:** Throttle to Slow 3G, reload /cs2 — skeletons match new chassis layout (header bar, image area, body lines, stats strip).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/MapCardSkeleton.tsx", "src/app/components/WeaponCardSkeleton.tsx", "src/app/cs2/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Both components keep public API", "Use cs2-skel-* classes", "No Tailwind", "Loading branch wraps in cs2-redesign scope", "Skeletons match loaded card shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Cleanup, route loader, and verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete cs2.module.css, prune dead imports, align loading.tsx, run full verification matrix.

**Files:**
- Delete: `src/app/cs2/cs2.module.css`
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/cs2/loading.tsx`

**Verify:** npm run build succeeds. Walk full spec verification matrix (visual cohesion, hero, maps, weapons, mechanics, CTA, loading, responsive, a11y, console, CLS).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/cs2/cs2.module.css", "src/app/cs2/page.tsx", "src/app/cs2/loading.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cs2.module.css deleted", "No styles.* references in page.tsx", "komplexaci.css import KEPT in page.tsx (provides Header pill-nav styles)", "AnimatedSection/StaggeredGrid/Icon imports removed from page.tsx", "loading.tsx uses Esports Pro language", "npm run build passes", "All spec verification checks pass"]}
```
